channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] OpenAI co-founder Andrej Karpathy joins Anthropic’s pre-training team
item.description:
📊 Score: 225 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ⭐A-Authority:openai(+70)
  • ⭐A-Authority:anthropic(+70)
  • ⭐A-Authority:andrej karpathy(+70)
  • ❌Industry-Gate:fail(-30)

📄 Summary: Pre-training is responsible for the large-scale training runs that give Claude its core knowledge and capabilities, according to the company. It's also one of the most expensive, compute-intensive phases of building a frontier model....
